use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING BACTERIAL VAGINOSIS BY SINGLE DOSE ADMINISTRATION OF A CLINDAMYCIN PHARMACEUTICAL GEL FORMULATION

indications.text:
1.1 Bacterial Vaginosis
XACIATO is indicated for the treatment of bacterial vaginosis in females 12 years and older [see
Use in Specific Populations (8.1) and Clinical Studies (14)].
